title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click 'Forgot Password' and follow email instructions.

title: Update Email
content: To update your email, go to Profile > Personal Info and edit your email address.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: Subscriptions can be cancelled from Billing > Manage Plan.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two-factor authentication under Security Settings.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after approval.
